feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Multi Combo box with input control in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Multi Combo box with input from the marketplace. I have a requirement to set some values in the list as selected during load of the app. For this i used the Set component property from marketplace and tried to set the SelectedTokenList. I was able to set the list to the control but after this the list in the multi combo box is not shown.

Can anyone help me to set the values in the multi combo box with input control and still get the list bound to the combo box.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: SAP Build FTP Get File Collection Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering an issue in SAP Build when attempting to retrieve a File Collection from SFTP (Port 22). Although the connection appears to be stable and the folder path is valid, when utilizing the Get File Collection for FTP function, it returns 0 lists and 0 elements, despite the presence of multiple files within the folder.

entry.title: Not able to do build apps its says FAILED with ERROR:
entry.content:
Runtime version: 4.9.260;
AB version: 2.3.0
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 npxrnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

SAP Build Apps SAP Build

entry.title: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using Inline frame
entry.content:
Hello All,

i am trying to add an external URL in one of the SAP Build apps using Inline Frame . So i am trying to add the URL in src properties but i am a blank screen while previewing the app in Web.

 

Please guide how to embed the URL.

entry.title: Question about how to post odata api using build apps
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm creating a application on build apps,trying to get the data from excel file and transfer those data to s4hana using odata api_sales_order_srv.

I've successfully create the btp connection and also make a get request using the api.

But when i try to post those data, i got error like "Enter a document number between 0005000000 and 0005999999". I followed this page to create the post body.(Try Out | Sales Order (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub)

I'm wondering how to deal with this error since the data entity do not have a "doucument number" column.

Hope to get some help.Thanks in advance

entry.title: Can't Build Apps and Build Code be activated on the same subaccount?
entry.content:
Hi builders,

I tried to enable Build code to subaccount which had Build apps already.
But It couldn't be enabled like I couldn't make a new project in Build code.

So I tried to make 2 subaccounts, one was with only Build apps and the other one was with only Build code. But each subaccount couldn't work. I could see warning sign when I tried to make service through Booster.

Did anyone suffer from this problem? Or Can anyone from the product team answer this issue?

entry.title: Connect to SuccessFactors by using an "OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion" destination
entry.content:
Hi everyone 😃

I will try to expone my scenario as clear as possible. I am just trying to create a first "SAP Build App" to connect to SuccessFactors Employee Central. I have no problem getting this done by creating a BTP Destination by using "Basic Authentication". 

However, I cannot get this done by creating an endpoint of type "OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion". From BTP Destinations side, the connectivity check seems to be working fine (HTTP 200 response), but when I try to add this integration within my application, I always get the attached error.

Any support will be more than appreciated.

Thank you in advanced !!!

entry.title: CSRF token issue with Rest API type of system integration in SAP build apps
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a backend destination in subaccount and tried creating a 'SAP BTP Destination REST API integration' type data entity.

We select the BTP destination created in subaccount and configure the list(GET call) to the required entity. we are adding additional inputs for filters.

and passing filter value dynamically from JS file as below in get record collection.(formula : "?$filter="+outputs["JSFile"].result)

This is working perfectly fine in local app preview from build apps. But when i deploy the app to launchpad and expose the app as tile and open it through launchpad i get CSRF token error as below.

Are we missing any configuration? Please help us with any idea/ suggestions.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: Capturing the approval form status on SAP BPA (Build Process Automation)
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question about SAP Build Process Automation (BPA). If I create an approval form with options to approve or reject, can I capture the approval status and integrate it with SAP Build Apps?

Specifically, I want to display statuses such as 'Approved', 'Rejected', and 'Pending' in SAP Build Apps using the form. 'Approved' if the user clicks approve, 'Rejected' if the user clicks reject, and 'Pending' if the user hasn't clicked approve or reject yet.

I only acknowledged about taking the status of a whole process and what I want it the status inside the process which is the approval form.

My guess is that we can retrieve the status by create an action. If so, how the configuration will be? Or are there any existing functionalities within SAP BPA for capturing and retrieving approval form status, like using output of the form?

Best regards,
Isyraf

entry.title: Getting Internal server error after deploying application in cloud foundry
entry.content: I'm getting a "internal server error" after successfully deploying a sap build app in cloud foundry via btp. After deployment, when I try to open the application from the url that I get from deploying, I get this problem.

entry.title: 500 missing Zone Information and internal server error while launching the deployed HTML5 build ap
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am following the below post for deploying an existing application from Sap build apps to SAP BTP CF environment .
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-deply.html

The app is getting deployed successfully but while launching the HTML5 app, i am getting internal server error in browser and 500 missing zone Information error in application logs.Attached the error screenshots for reference.

Please check and help me to resolve the issue.

Regards,

Rakesh

entry.title: Re: IAS with Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS teant and also i have the Launchpad admin role.

 

Please check and help me with the issue.

entry.title: Unable to find Identity Authentication tab in SAP Build Work Zone standard edition.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS tenant and also i have the Launchpad admin role assigned to my IAS User.

are there any changes recently or am i missing something? Please help .

 

@SAPSupport @William_Yu 

 

Regards,

Rakesh

entry.title: My page canvas/view is missing
entry.content:
Hi all

This is my first time I encounter this problem

I can't put a component as well. I hit refresh, open it back from the lobby, it still gives me empty/blank page. This only happen at the first page

Any idea on how to fix it?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Import Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am learning from https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-cap-app.html tutorial.

I am getting error while importing RiskManagement.mtar file to https://ABCDEtrial.us10.build.cloud.sap/lobby  (My SAP BTP Trial account).

I can upload RiskManagement.gpg file to lobby provided in above tutorial without any errors.

How can I identify gap in my BAS code.

Application is developed in BAS tool and able to fetch data from 

"curl https://RiskManagement-RiskManagementService.dest/Risks" command. 

 

 

 

Thank you in Advance.

Prasanna

entry.title: Drop Down not working in Mobile App - SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are creating a Build app and we have 2 drop downs in it. We are binding it to the backend(SAP ECC) OData entity by using the MAP() function.

We have created a data variable and the data variable is set during the page mount event. We have removed the delay as well while getting the Data Collection. Data Collection is small enough where we don't need any pagination.

Though the dropdown works in the web preview but does not work with mobile preview. When we select a value from drop down it scrolls back to the TOP.

We tried adding another drop down from the Northwind service to try and that works fine. 

Any pointers will help.

@Dan_Wroblewski 

Regards

Braham

entry.title: Native modal webview in Appgyver
entry.content:
Hi there,

Is there a way to make a "native" modal webview with Appgyver instead of using the "Open in modal" true/false from the logic canva or the "Open web browser" flow from marketplace ?

Here's an example :

- https://i.sstatic.net/FPDUS.png

I though it looks better than a custom modal and makes the users more confortable.

Thank you !

entry.title: SAP Desktop agent control tower is not working.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

 

I am unable to do registration of new Agent. The screen is stucked after clicking 'Agents'. Please see the attached screenshots. Please suggest what to do to fix this.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Toast Message
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Build Apps generates three toast messages when clicked for the second time and thereafter. Here's how it works. Any solution?

 

Regards

Komal

entry.title: Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached : Error in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have SAP Build Process automation with Free Tier. I have created a basic job for extracting details from PDF and returning the raw information. When I run/ test the automation separately I can see the results. But when I deploy it and trigger the Process I am getting "Maximum number of concurrent unattended execution reached" error in the Monitoring tab.

I have attached images for reference

Tagging experts

@Archana 
@Chaitanya_Priya
